base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: This should reduce charm_wall_breakaway_long exposure duration and tail heat while retaining most of its high average PnL. Tradeoff: the profile may give up some large convex winners; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001 or if profile PnL/exposure drops below roughly 200.
label: charm-wall-exit-compression
rationale: Use batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long, but change mechanism from the prior failed structure gate. The current leader is already a local optimum, and broad pruning is destructive. Charm-wall breakaway is small-sample but unusually profitable, with high MFE and no slow >=12h trades; the risk-adjusted experiment is to compress its exit/extension envelope rather than tighten higher-high/higher-low structure again.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Call Wall Acceptance Clean Sample Builder
